title: Electrical Age 2
body:
Electrical Age 2 is a successor to Electrical Age 1 for Minecraft 1.7.10. It has a ways to go, but provides realistic electrical solutions in-game, with blocks such as resistors, wires, diodes, voltage sources, grounds, batteries, solar panels, capacitors, and inductors.

More stuff on the way soon! Always looking for more developers interested in working on the project.

Please note that we do have mod analytics in the game that can be disabled in the configuration file for the mod. They are 100% anonymous, we do not save IP addresses, usernames, or any other identifiable information. You can read more [here](https://github.com/age-series/ElectricalAge2/issues/187).
